calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Daniel Piccinini, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Cynthia Chiem, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Sonny Louie, individually and doing business as Arch-Tech.
Default was entered against defendant on October 7, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Cynthia Chiem, and against the Defaulted Defendant Sonny Louie, individually and doing business as Arch-Tech, as follows:

Attorney Fees - $2,000.00.
Costs - Per Memorandum of Cost.

Total - $2,000.00.

Additionally, the subject property, located at 1627-1629 Irving Street, San Francsico, CA 94122 is hereby decreed released of the Mechanic's Lein.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Continued To Nov-24-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Setting Date Of Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-28-2010 Off Calendar
